scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --local --ip 127.0.0.1 --port 5173
scripts.preview: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --local --ip 127.0.0.1 --port 4173
scripts.d1:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute voges-banking --local --file=sample_data/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute voges-banking --local --file=sample_data/seed.sql
scripts.d1:seed:remote: wrangler d1 execute voges-banking --remote --file=sample_data/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute voges-banking --remote --file=sample_data/seed.sql
